title: Modern Dev Tools That Actually Improve Team Workflow
description: Join fellow engineers for a discussion on modern development tooling, workflow improvements, and the practical ways new tools are changing how teams build software.

title: What Makes a Feature Worth Building?
description: Come explore how thoughtful product decisions, feature prioritization, and user feedback shape successful releases and stronger product outcomes.

title: Design Trends Worth Paying Attention To in 2026
description: A conversation for designers and frontend folks about emerging design trends, interface patterns, and how to build experiences that stay relevant over time.

title: Startup Milestones, Setbacks, and Lessons Learned
description: Hear the story behind key milestones, lessons learned, and the decisions that helped shape a growing company from its early stages to where it is today.

title: Sustainable AI: Building Smarter, Greener Systems
description: Join us for a discussion on the environmental impact of AI systems, sustainable infrastructure choices, and how teams can balance performance with responsible engineering practices.

title: Small Software Changes That Save Teams Big Time
description: A practical session on workflow optimization, software improvements, and the kinds of product decisions that help teams work faster and more effectively.

title: Behind the Stack: How Modern ML Platforms Are Built
description: Take a closer look at the infrastructure, research ideas, and engineering tradeoffs behind modern machine learning platforms in this deep-dive session for AI enthusiasts and builders.

title: Using Data to Improve Retention and Customer Success
description: Join this session on experimentation, analytics, and growth strategy to see how data-informed decisions can improve customer experience and long-term retention.

title: Turning User Research Into Better Interface Decisions
description: A UX-focused event on turning user interviews, feedback, and behavioral insights into more intuitive interfaces and stronger product experiences.

title: Building Team Culture That Supports Great Work
description: Join us for a conversation on team culture, collaboration, and the workplace habits that help creative and technical teams do their best work together.

title: Engineering for Sustainability in Real-World Systems
description: Explore how engineers are approaching sustainability through smarter systems, better design decisions, and practical innovations that reduce environmental impact.

title: Recent Product Updates and the Thinking Behind Them
description: Join other product-minded builders for a walkthrough of recent updates, feature improvements, and the thinking behind changes designed to improve day-to-day workflows.
